issues.title: Activation job crashes: Cannot find module 'check_daily_effective_workflow_guardrail.cjs' (MODULE_NOT_FOUND)
issues.recurrence: NEW this window and dominant by count (4/8 fails). Confined to ONE feature PR branch (copilot/fix-daily-credit-limit-test) that is developing the daily-credit-limit guardrail; all 4 PR review workflows fail identically. NOT on prod main yet — but a reproducible packaging gap that WILL redden main if merged with the .cjs unbundled.
issues.note: activation job runs require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/check_daily_effective_workflow_guardrail.cjs') -> '##[error]Unhandled error: Error: Cannot find module ...check_daily_effective_workflow_guardrail.cjs'. The agent job is then correctly SKIPPED (agent.result=skipped) but the activation job failure reddens the whole run. The guardrail .cjs is referenced by compiled lock files on the feature branch but is not bundled in the action package. Same MODULE_NOT_FOUND family as the (now-absent) minimatch crash but in the activation guardrail step. Runs 27103538546/47/66/67. GH_AW_MAX_DAILY_AI_CREDITS=500000 present.
issues.fix: Bundle check_daily_effective_workflow_guardrail.cjs into the action build before merging the daily-credit-limit feature; add a CI smoke test that node-requires every .cjs the activation job references.

issues.title: copilot_sdk_driver.cjs crashes at startup: Cannot find module 'minimatch' (MODULE_NOT_FOUND)
issues.recurrence: ABSENT 2026-06-07: not observed in any of the 28 copilot runs this window (was the dominant 6/16 failure class on 06-06). Tentatively resolved/fixed; keep watching one more window before closing.
issues.note: node /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/copilot_sdk_driver.cjs throws Error: Cannot find module 'minimatch' at require (copilot_sdk_driver.cjs:42:23), code=MODULE_NOT_FOUND. The bundled sdk-driver requires 'minimatch' which is not installed/bundled in the action's node_modules. Because it is a missing-dependency error the copilot-harness retries (4 attempts) all fail the same way, wasting whole prod-main scheduled runs. Likely introduced by a recent sdk-driver bundling change. Runs: Linter Miner 27069431407, Daily Secrets 27069682890, PR Code Quality Reviewer 27069819378 + 27069914133, Daily Testify 27070138441, PR Triage 27070604747.

issues.title: Detection (prompt-injection scan) job reddens run: ERR_PARSE no THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT despite continue-on-error
issues.recurrence: ABSENT 2026-06-07: Design Decision Gate ran 4x this window (3 success on main, 1 fail on PR branch from the unrelated guardrail-module crash); no detection ERR_PARSE observed. Was NEW 06-06.
issues.note: Design Decision Gate run 27065879421 (claude, PR): agent succeeded but the detection step emitted 'detection execution outcome: failure' + 'ERR_PARSE: No THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT found in detection log. The detection model may have failed to follow the output format.' Despite GH_AW_DETECTION_CONTINUE_ON_ERROR=true the detection job conclusion is failure, reddening the run. Detection model occasionally omits the required THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT marker; parser then hard-fails.

issues.title: Prod-main workflows hard-fail instantly on model/param config drift (effort unsupported / model not found)
issues.note: Two variants: (a) Daily Caveman Optimizer [claude] -> 400 invalid_request_error 'This model does not support the effort parameter' (claude model pinned with a reasoning-effort/effort param it rejects); (b) Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer [codex] -> 404 'Model not found <id>' at the responses endpoint (codex model id deprecated/removed; id has rotated adelie-alpha-2026-02-19 -> gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07, both 404). Both fail fast on every retry, cheap but total. Static config drift after a model/param change.
issues.note_2026_06_08: Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer codex failed again (day4 plugin-auth); Caveman effort-400 NOT a failure this window

issues.title: 429 Maximum effective tokens exceeded (25M cap)
issues.recurrence: ABSENT 2026-06-07 (and prior 2 windows). Daily Ambient Context Optimizer not in this small window's run-set; no 429 observed. Cap edge unresolved but quiet. Soft pre-cap guard still not in place.
issues.note: Heavy daily-aggregation workflows hover at/over the 25M effective-token cap. Intermittent; depends on run-set size. Soft pre-cap guard still not in place.

issues.title: One failed safe-output item reds the whole safe_outputs job
issues.recurrence: ABSENT 2026-06-07: PR Sous Chef ran 3x on main this window (0/7/21 turns, execution-drift flagged) all SUCCESS; no safe_outputs partial-failure observed. Was RECUR 06-06. Fix still not shipped.
issues.note: Agents emit a safe-output item the framework rejects (here PR Sous Chef sub_agent_error on one PR) and the partial failure reds an otherwise-successful agent job.

issues.title: copilot-sdk-driver headless-path failures (auth + tool-permission + session.idle timeout)
issues.note: sdk-driver path denies tools (read on repo source/_test.go files, shell sed) the workflow legitimately needs; after 5 denials the harness aborts the attempt. The denied tools are in the workflow's own tool config but the sdk-driver permission mapping (allow-tool entries from GH_AW_COPILOT_SDK_SERVER_ARGS) does not grant them. Earlier windows saw cache-memory read/shell denials too.
issues.note_2026_06_08: session.idle 870s timeout on PR Code Quality Reviewer 27160990743 AFTER emitting valid review (wasted work); tool-perm-lockout on Daily Safe Output Integrator 27161455868 (read test.go denied)
issues.note_2026_06_09: RECUR: tool-perm-lockout on Daily Safe Output Integrator (27230190112, 11 permission-denied, turns=1, also the windows 1 missing_tool) + session.idle on PR Code Quality Reviewer PR branch (27233924083, turns=1).

issues.title: Copilot agent job concludes failure despite producing a valid agent_output report
issues.recurrence: 06-07: TQS failed again (run 27103538546) but root cause is the activation-guardrail-cjs-module-not-found crash (PR branch copilot/fix-daily-credit-limit-test), NOT a copilot agent-job redden — agent was correctly SKIPPED. TQS also ran successfully once on the same PR branch. The valid-output-redden shape itself was NOT observed; this id is quiet. Keep watching.
issues.note: 06-05: valid 77/100 report yet job reddened (run 27036058696). 06-06: empty {"items":[]} output, turns=0, agent job failed (run 27069819373). Possibly two different root causes filed under one id; split if 06-06 shape recurs with a captured minimatch/sdk crash.

issues.title: update_pull_request update_branch blocked: GitHub App lacks 'workflows' permission for PRs touching .lock.yml
issues.note: Non-fatal warning. update_branch can never succeed for PRs that modify .github/workflows/*.lock.yml without the workflows scope.

issues.title: create_discussion safe-output lacks label + temporary_id fields
issues.note: Product gap surfaced by smoke test: create_discussion cannot attach labels (e.g. ai-generated) or a temporary_id for cross-referencing.

issues.title: Serena MCP server absent from mcp-cli manifest
issues.recurrence: re-surfaced by Smoke Claude probe 2026-06-05 (also Smoke Codex web-fetch)
issues.note: Environment note: manifest exposes only agenticworkflows/mcpscripts/safeoutputs/tavily. Smoke tests expect serena (Claude) and web-fetch MCP (Codex). Likely config drift, not a regression.

issues.title: Firewall blocked-request ratio
issues.recurrence: 0% blocked (0/2516) this window — clean. No smoke probes ran in this small Sunday cluster, and the scheduled/PR runs that did run hit only allowed domains. Was 18.8% on 06-06. By-design; no firewall-caused failure.
issues.note: By-design SNI/domain denials; no firewall-caused run failure this window.

issues.title: Copilot token-check rejects PAT: '400 Personal Access Tokens are not supported for this endpoint'
issues.recurrence: RESOLVED 2026-06-09: 4 runs (Copilot PR Prompt Pattern Analysis, Daily Project Perf Summary, [aw] Failure Investigator, Auto-Triage Issues) carried the "Personal Access Tokens are not supported" signature but ALL concluded success on attempt 1 — harness now tolerates/retries past the token-check 400. Zero PAT-400-attributable failures this window (was ~15 yesterday). Fix branch pelikhan/fix-pat-400-retry landed.
issues.detail: Onset 2026-06-08T19:40:19Z, ongoing. copilot-harness AND copilot-sdk-driver token-check POST a PAT to an endpoint that rejects PATs -> 400 exit1 turns=0. ~15 runs/window incl prod-main. Pre-incident 88% -> post 58%. In-flight fix branch pelikhan/fix-pat-400-retry.

issues.title: awf-cli-proxy container DIFC liveness probe fails (localhost:18443 connection refused)
issues.detail: awf-cli-proxy container errors at startup; DIFC proxy liveness probe to localhost:18443 connection refused -> agent never starts (turns=0). 2 runs, pre-incident 18:xx.
issues.note_2026_06_09: RECUR day2: liveness probe failed for localhost:18443 (gh api exit=0) on Issue Monster (27229956123) and PR Sous Chef (27229990045), both turns=0 — agent never starts. awf-cli-proxy DIFC probe still flaky. NOTE other PR Sous Chef runs on main succeeded → intermittent, not deterministic.

issues.title: 429 Maximum AI credits exceeded (account/daily credit cap ~1000) aborts heavy prod-main run mid-flight
issues.note: Daily Ambient Context Optimizer (copilot, prod-main, run 27233269431) ran 57 turns / 3.0M tokens then the Copilot API returned CAPIError 429 'Maximum AI credits exceeded (1026.775860 / 1000)' after 5 retries (98.6s wait) -> run failure. This is the ACCOUNT/DAILY AI-CREDITS cap (~1000 credits), DISTINCT from the 25M effective-token cap (token-budget-429-effective-tokens, which was ABSENT). Heavy daily aggregator burns enough credits to cross the cap late in its run, wasting all prior work. Related to the daily-credit-limit guardrail feature.
issues.fix: Add a soft pre-cap credit guard that checks remaining daily AI credits before the heaviest aggregation turns and degrades gracefully (emit partial output + noop) instead of 429-aborting; or raise the cap for the few heavy prod-main aggregators; or shard Ambient's work across smaller runs.

issues.title: Copilot CLI step hits hard 15-minute action timeout after producing valid work (work wasted, run reddened)
issues.note: Test Quality Sentinel (copilot, PR branch copilot/feature-dangerously-disable-sandbox-agent, run 27234356749) ran 20 turns / 649k tokens of valid review work, then '##[error]The action Execute GitHub Copilot CLI has timed out after 15 minutes' -> failure. Distinct from sdk session.idle; this is the GitHub Actions step-level timeout on the copilot_harness.cjs invocation. Valid in-flight work lost. Sibling TQS runs on other PR branches succeeded.
issues.fix: Raise the Copilot CLI step timeout for review-heavy workflows, or add periodic checkpoint flushing of the review so a timeout still emits the buffered safe-output instead of reddening with nothing.
